meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. An Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code for SaaS founders.
content.answer_block: To overcome a lack of portfolio, use Claude Code to rapidly scaffold high-value SaaS features, then utilize Antigravity to abstract complex logic into reusable modules. By automating the build process, you create a public-facing repository of production-grade code that demonstrates technical competence and accelerates your path to first revenue.
content.intro:
The silence of a blank GitHub profile is deafening, especially when you are pitching investors or early adopters who demand proof of execution. You have the vision, but your lack of a tangible portfolio is the primary barrier between you and your first paying customer. The market doesn't care about your potential; it cares about your deployable assets.

We are shifting the paradigm from 'coding' to 'architecting.' By leveraging Claude Code to handle the heavy lifting and Antigravity to systematize your logic, you can turn a weekend of focused effort into a professional-grade repository. This isn't just about building apps; it's about building credibility at the speed of light.

steps.title: Define the High-Value SaaS Module
steps.description: Select a complex utility that solves a real business pain, such as a secure payment webhook handler or an automated data pipeline.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the business requirements for a secure Stripe webhook handler and design a modular architecture that prioritizes auditability and error recovery.

steps.title: Scaffold with Claude Code
steps.description: Generate the boilerplate and core logic structures to ensure your code meets modern production standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust file structure for a Node.js API that includes middleware for rate limiting, authentication, and structured logging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a production-ready API structure with Express and Zod validation'

steps.title: Abstract Logic via Antigravity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to decompose your monolithic logic into clean, testable, and reusable functions that display high engineering maturity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the current logic into a series of pure, decoupled functions that follow the Single Responsibility Principle.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor existing service logic into modular components'

steps.title: Implement Automated Testing Suites
steps.description: A portfolio without tests is just a script. Build comprehensive unit and integration tests to prove your rigor.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate comprehensive Jest test cases for the module, covering edge cases like network failure and invalid payload formats.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate unit tests for all modules created in step 3'

steps.title: Document for Professional Impact
steps.description: Create a README that explains the 'why' behind your architecture, demonstrating business-oriented thinking.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a professional README.md that highlights the system architecture, business impact, and scalability of this solution.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate a professional README.md including architecture diagrams and setup instructions'

pro_tips: Always include a 'Cost Analysis' section in your README to demonstrate you understand the financial implications of your infrastructure choices.
Use Claude Code to generate 'ADRs' (Architecture Decision Records) for every major component; it signals senior-level thinking to recruiters and partners.
Focus on 'DevOps-as-Code' by including CI/CD pipeline configurations in your portfolio projects, even if you aren't deploying them yet.
Never commit raw code; use Claude Code to prune unnecessary comments and enforce a strict, clean code style guide across the entire repo.
Document your failures—include a 'Challenges Overcome' section in your documentation to show you can debug complex production issues.
content.next_steps: After completing your first module, deploy it to a staging environment and link it within your LinkedIn profile. Use the repository as a case study in your next sales deck.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to build a portfolio that commands authority and attracts revenue. Stop waiting for the perfect moment and start shipping features that prove your value. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
